name: gravity-simulator
description: Gravity Simulator - Android app built with Tauri

scripts.build:android:quick: npm run copy:frontend && npx tauri android build --apk
scripts.build:android:debug: npm run copy:frontend && npx tauri android build --apk --debug
scripts.copy:frontend: node -e "require('fs').existsSync('dist') || require('fs').mkdirSync('dist'); require('fs').cpSync('index.html','dist/index.html'); require('fs').cpSync('style.css','dist/style.css'); require('fs').cpSync('script.js','dist/script.js'); require('fs').cpSync('lang.json','dist/lang.json'); console.log('Frontend copied to dist/');"
